data.body: PASS 1 review (T11 — Data-migration / backfill safety): NOT-APPLICABLE / PASS. Cluster 1 is a byte-preserving DRY refactor; it does not change any persisted format or backfill data (every migrated site reproduces its exact current output bytes, including stored signatures, value_hash, and manifest hash). The migration-execution safety checks (expand-contract, batching, resumability, dual-write window, rollback) do not apply to a non-persisted, behavior-preserving code consolidation. No T11 findings.
